description: SANITIZED TEMPLATE for data/golden_retrieval.json (which is git-ignored — it holds real member data). Consumed by src/testing/retrieval_eval.py. Each query carries `gold`: a list of specs, where a spec is a list of substrings that must ALL co-occur in a single retrieved chunk (accent/case-insensitive). Multiple specs = multiple relevant chunks (recall@k = fraction covered). Fill the real file with anchors verified present in data/all_messages_cleaned.jsonl.

queries.query: Como se chama o animal do <Member A>?
queries.note: Single distinctive anchor that identifies the relevant chunk.

queries.query: O animal do <Member A> chama-se <Member B's pet>?
queries.note: Attribution trap: the correct chunk must surface A's fact, not B's.

queries.query: Quando foi a última vez que falaram de <topic>?
queries.note: Temporal-intent query; the latest matching chunk should rank.
English query against code-switched PT/EN logs — multilingual dense recall.
Rare exact term/domain — dense-only weak spot, lexical strong spot.
Query names a member → person-filter active. Members whose sender string differs from their alias (e.g. 'First Last' vs alias 'first') are missed by the exact-match participant filter.
